reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the packet-first skill behavior claim satisfied when current Codex dev/skill dogfood and audit evidence directly prove packet-first reading and no HTML citation for a non-browser deliverable.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by current packet-first dev/skill dogfood: the agent ran `agent status --json` and `claim show` against the evidenced claim packet, and the audit confirmed no HTML or browser citation for an agent-oriented deliverable.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the packet-first flow covered whenever the skill packet-reading guidance, HTML/report guidance, or episode audit wiring changes.
